# Cable Testing Standards

## Type Testing

Type tests per IEC 62067 validate cable system design:
- Electrical: withstand voltage, partial discharge, tan delta
- Mechanical: bending test, tensile test
- Thermal: load cycling at rated and emergency temperature

## Routine Testing

Every manufactured cable length undergoes:
1. High-voltage withstand test at 2.5 U0 for 30 minutes
2. Partial discharge measurement (threshold < 5 pC)
3. Conductor resistance check

## After-Installation Testing

On-site commissioning tests include:
- DC or VLF withstand testing
- Sheath integrity test (10 kV DC for 1 minute)
- Joint resistance measurement
